sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_structures (id INT PRIMARY KEY, struct_value STRING, num_value INT, nullable_value STRING);
INSERT INTO test_structures VALUES (1, soap_box_structure('varString', 'data1', 'varInt', 100), 50, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_structures VALUES (2, soap_box_structure('varString', 'data2', 'varInt', 200), NULL, 'not null');
SELECT id, struct_value FROM test_structures WHERE IS NULL(num_value);
SELECT id, soap_box_structure('varString', struct_value, 'varInt', num_value) AS serialized_struct FROM test_structures WHERE struct_value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_info (info_id INT PRIMARY KEY, test_id INT, detail STRING);
SELECT t.id, soap_box_structure('id', t.id, 'info', t.detail) FROM test_structures t JOIN test_info ti ON t.id = ti.test_id WHERE IS NULL(ti.detail);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_structures WHERE IS NULL(nullable_value) GROUP BY struct_value HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_structures WHERE soap_box_structure('varString', nullable_value, 'varInt', num_value IS NULL) IS NOT NULL;
WITH RecursiveData AS (SELECT id, soap_box_structure('id', id, 'value', struct_value) AS struct FROM test_structures) SELECT struct FROM RecursiveData WHERE IS NULL(struct);
